name: Zoom Accounts Using Personal Email Domains
description: Detects active zoom accounts using personal email domains instead of corporate identity domains.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.email AS email FROM zoom_users u WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(u.status, '')) IN ('active','enabled','provisioned','onboarded') AND LOWER(COALESCE(u.email, '')) SIMILAR TO '%@(gmail|yahoo|hotmail|outlook)\\.com'
remediation: Migrate account identities to corporate domains and disable personal-domain access where not explicitly approved.
